150 D0500G1_STF_CNCNTRTN_CD D0500G1_STF_CNCNTRTN_CD D0500G1 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Concentration Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment whether the resident is having trouble concentrating. -=Not assessed/no information
